ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province or state where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "city_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the city type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the city type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city classification */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_classifications_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES city_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_classifications_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_data" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary data entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "avg_salary" REAL /* Average annual salary in the city */,
  "avg_monthly_net_pay" REAL /* Average monthly net pay in the city */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used for salary data */,
  "job_category" TEXT /* Job category for the salary data */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry for the salary data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_of_living_data" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost of living data entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "avg_cost_of_living" REAL /* Average monthly cost of living in the city */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used for cost of living data */,
  "cost_category" TEXT /* Cost category for the cost of living data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_of_living_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_of_living_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "affordability_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affordability index data entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "affordability_index" REAL /* Affordability index percentage for the city */,
  "calculation_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method used to calculate the affordability index */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the affordability index was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_affordability_indices_calculation_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("calculation_method_id") REFERENCES calculation_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_affordability_indices_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calculation_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calculation method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the calculation method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the calculation method */,
  "method_formula" TEXT /* Mathematical formula for the calculation method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, public) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the city data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the city data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate type of the city */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the city's population */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the city */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken in the city */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Average education level of the city's population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_metadata_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "median_home_price" REAL /* Median home price in the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_neighborhoods_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
